commands: Include tax effects in the NPV calculation to provide a more accurate cash flow projection.
Re-evaluate the discount rate to ensure it reflects the true cost of capital, possibly considering a lower rate to enhance project attractiveness.
Provide sensitivity analysis on key assumptions such as renovation costs and working capital changes to assess their impact on NPV and IRR.
Detail the cash flow projections over the 10-year horizon to illustrate how increased production capacity translates into revenue growth.
Discuss potential risks associated with the investment, including market demand fluctuations and operational challenges during the renovation phase.
